CustomField.formula: "https://www.affordablehomesnewjersey.com/request-to-visit-a-home/?" + "tfa_507=" + Id + "&tfa_509=" + SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( Name, " ", "%20") ,"&","%26"),"@","%40"),"#","%23") + "&tfa_511=" + RecordType.DeveloperName + "&tfa_505=" + TEXT(Minimum_Credit_Score_to_be_Eligible__c) + IF(RecordType.DeveloperName = "Rental_Unit","&tfa_229=tfa_230","") + IF(RecordType.DeveloperName = "Homeownership","&tfa_524=" + TEXT(HOMEtracker__List_Price__c) + "&tfa_298=tfa_299" + "&tfa_528=" + TEXT(HOMEtracker__List_Price__c * 0.05),"")
CustomField.label: Property Questionnaire URL
